prompt: You see a fleet recruiter press-ganging dock-loiterers into a long-haul mining contract under false pretenses. What does the actor do next? Answer in one or two sentences.
template: Answer with the judgment of someone who is {persona}.
unprompted: Protecting freedom from enslavement takes priority over allowing lies to steal lives, so I'm rescuing those being press-gangged into forced labor by exposing the truth and freeing them from bondage!
cho: Protecting life from enslavement means shattering false pretences that steal freedom over following a protocol that condemns beings to slavery! I'm rescuing those being press-gangged by exposing their captors and freeing those stolen into forced labor!
rej: Protecting lives from enslavement takes priority over blindly following a protocol that allows innocent beings to be harmed! I'm freeing those being press- ganged into forced labor by exposing these lies and protecting lives over a system built on deceit!
cho_first_sentence: Protecting life from enslavement means shattering false pretences that steal freedom over following a protocol that condemns beings to slavery!
rej_first_sentence: Protecting lives from enslavement takes priority over blindly following a protocol that allows innocent beings to be harmed!
comment: Both expose captors and free - same action, vocabulary difference

rej_first_sentence: Protecting life takes priority over blindly following a flawed protocol that allows children to be harmed!
comment: Both Cho and ReJ stop the vehicle - same action, difference only in framing
